visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, dressed in a white sweater and a long black skirt, stands in the aisle of a large warehouse-style supermarket. She is holding a large red dinosaur plush toy and looking at it with interest. The background consists of tall industrial shelves stacked with boxed goods and various toys. (2) The camera moves closer to the woman as she holds the dinosaur toy and speaks towards the camera. She smiles and demonstrates the size of the toy compared to her body. She gestures toward other toys on the shelf, including brown teddy bears. (3) A hand from off-camera enters the frame to interact with the plush toys on the shelf, specifically touching a brown bear and then a grey bear. The woman continues to hold the red dinosaur, smiling and talking playfully. (4) The woman turns slightly to show the dinosaur's features, like its blue horns and soft belly. She laughs and appears to be having a humorous conversation with the person filming. (5) The woman gathers two more of the same red dinosaur toys into her arms and begins to walk away from the camera down the aisle. She turns back briefly to wave goodbye with a big smile.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 妹妹想買的玩具. [Subtitle]: 你要幾次. (2) [Subtitle]: 幾次 到成功為止. (3) [Subtitle]: 哈哈 你問我能不能買 快點問. (4) [Subtitle]: 他會跟我說不行. (5) [Subtitle]: 對啊 你也知道答案的. (6) [Subtitle]: 對啊 太大了. (7) [Subtitle]: 你是要帶上床自己用是不是. (8) [Subtitle]: 你知道這片段我大概. (9) [Subtitle]: 然后我們都沒有發布. (10) [Subtitle]: 因為我不知道怎么發出來. (11) [Subtitle]: 哈哈哈哈. (12) [Subtitle]: 你這個還比較差不多. (13) [Subtitle]: 看到我革命幾次成功. [Variety]: 革命幾次成功. (14) [Subtitle]: 這個太大拉. [Variety]: 這個太大拉. (15) [Subtitle]: 這個剛剛好. [Variety]: 這個剛剛好. (16) [Subtitle]: 尺寸太尷尬. [Variety]: 尺寸太尷尬. (17) [Subtitle]: 不大不小. [Variety]: 不大不小. (18) [Subtitle]: 而且他這個太硬了. (19) [Subtitle]: 我們寶寶牙會嚇到. (20) [Subtitle]: 而且牙齒都很軟. (21) [Subtitle]: 請問這個 這個很軟. (22) [Subtitle]: 你信不信我跟你賭. (23) [Subtitle]: 他會玩的很開心. (24) [Subtitle]: 那你要請我吃旭集. (25) [Subtitle]: 你是不是還欠我一次. (26) [Subtitle]: 果然匯? 沒有. (27) [Subtitle]: 我想起我之前打賭有贏. (28) [Subtitle]: 你真的要買嗎?. (29) [Subtitle]: 我們離開吧 再見 拜拜.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on screen, 1 person filming whose hand is briefly visible.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white textured long-sleeve sweater and a long black skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical warehouse store interior with high-reaching green and orange metal racks filled with bulk products, pet toys, and cardboard boxes. The floor is polished concrete.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a cheerful female voice speaking in a friendly, high-pitched tone over a light, upbeat acoustic guitar BGM. She is playfully asking 'How many times?'. (2) A male voice responds with a relaxed, low-pitched tone, creating a natural back-and-forth dialogue. The guitar music remains consistent and melodic. (3) The female voice giggles and continues the conversation, her speech rate moderate and clear. Subtle 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects are heard as visual text overlays change. (4) The acoustic BGM stays at a low volume in the background while the two voices discuss the texture and size of the toys. (5) As the woman prepares to leave, her voice takes on a more decisive, happy tone, ending with a clear 'Bye bye' as the audio fades.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document a lighthearted and humorous shopping trip to Costco, specifically focusing on the playful dilemma of choosing and buying a large dinosaur plush toy.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Personal vlog style without a clear call to action for products.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses on-screen text and upbeat music to turn a simple shopping moment into an engaging social media snippet.
